message:
feat(cli): Add xf models list and xf models info commands

Implements model inspection functionality for the xf CLI:

- xf models list: Shows all embedding and reranker models with status
  - Status indicators (✓/✗) for availability
  - Backend, dimensions, and MRL support info
  - Filtering by --model-type (embedder/reranker)
  - Filter to --available only models
  - JSON output support

- xf models info <name>: Shows detailed model metadata
  - Backend, category, dimensions, MRL support
  - Size estimate, availability, download status
  - Suggests closest match for unknown model names

Part of bd-32ph: CLI flags for model and reranker selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
